parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural movements, breathing, and facial expressions. The lighting, shadows, and physical interactions with the microphone are realistic and lack any AI-generated artifacts.

characters.appearance: Older woman, approximately 60-70 years old, with a slim build and a tanned complexion. She has short, straight blonde hair and visible facial wrinkles. She wears silver hoop earrings and multiple rings.
characters.wardrobe: A loose-fitting, white long-sleeve blouse with a v-neck and blue denim jeans. She accessorizes with multiple silver bracelets on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, expressive, and authoritative, using frequent hand gestures to emphasize her points.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, softly lit with a pink and purple gradient, featuring a potted plant and stacked books in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: An older woman with short blonde hair and a tanned complexion is sitting and speaking into a silver microphone held in her right hand. She is wearing a white long-sleeve blouse, blue jeans, silver hoop earrings, and several bracelets. Her left hand is gesturing actively as she speaks. The background is softly lit with a vibrant pink and purple gradient. Behind her to the left, there is a potted plant with dark green leaves and a stack of books. The framing is a medium close-up, focusing on her upper body and expressive face. The lighting highlights her features and creates a warm atmosphere.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features an older woman speaking into a microphone in a medium close-up shot. She is positioned in the center of the frame against a background lit with pink and purple hues. Large, white text overlays appear dynamically in the center of the screen, displaying her spoken words word-by-word or phrase-by-phrase. The text is bold and highly visible, tracking her speech. The overall composition is simple, focusing on the speaker and the prominent captions.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: La première règle pour apprendre l'anglais, c'est de connaître les 1000 mots, les 1000 mots que tout le monde utilise ! [The first rule to learn English is to know the 1000 words, the 1000 words that everyone uses!]
Character A says: Ça ne sert à rien la grammaire, les listes interminables de vocabulaire. [Grammar and endless vocabulary lists are useless.]
scenes.on_screen_text: La première règle pour apprendre l'anglais, c'est de connaître les 1000 mots, les 1000 mots que tout le monde utilise ! Ça ne sert à rien la grammaire, les listes interminables de vocabulaire.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, softly lit with a pink and purple gradient, featuring a potted plant and stacked books in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The older woman with short blonde hair is seated, continuing to hold a silver microphone in her right hand. She is dressed in a white blouse and blue jeans, adorned with silver jewelry. Her left hand is raised with fingers slightly curled, as she emphasizes a specific point. The background features the same pink and purple gradient lighting, along with the potted plant and stacked items. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up shot. Her expression is earnest and engaging. The overall composition keeps the focus entirely on her and her gestures.

scenes.visual_description: The shot continues with the older woman in a medium close-up, speaking into the microphone. The pink and purple background lighting remains consistent. White text overlays continue to appear in the center of the screen, matching her dialogue. The text is large and sans-serif, designed for easy reading on mobile devices. The visual focus is split between her gestures and the changing captions.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Et à partir de là, on peut parler anglais. [And from there, we can speak English.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Et à partir de là, on peut parler anglais.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, softly lit with a pink and purple gradient, featuring a potted plant and a framed object on the wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The older woman is holding the silver microphone close to her mouth with her right hand. She is wearing a white long-sleeve blouse, blue jeans, and silver hoop earrings. Her left hand is held up with her thumb and index finger close together in a precise, pinching gesture. The background is illuminated with bright pink and purple lighting, showing a potted plant on the left. A framed dark object is partially visible on the wall to the right. The shot is a medium close-up, capturing her enthusiastic demeanor. The lighting casts soft shadows, adding depth to the scene.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is shown in a medium close-up, gesturing with her left hand while holding the microphone. The background is a vibrant pink and purple gradient. Dynamic white text overlays are centered on the screen, displaying her speech in real-time. The captions are large and bold, dominating the lower-middle section of the frame. The scene is energetic, driven by her expressions and the fast-paced text.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Ça permet d'apprendre beaucoup plus vite. [It allows you to learn much faster.]
Character A says: C'est une méthode vraiment révolutionnaire. [It's a truly revolutionary method.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Ça permet d'apprendre beaucoup plus vite. C'est une méthode vraiment révolutionnaire.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, softly lit with a pink and purple gradient, featuring a potted plant and a framed object on the wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: The older woman is seated, now holding the silver microphone with both hands resting comfortably on her lap. She is wearing a white blouse, blue jeans, and multiple silver bracelets. She is smiling broadly and looking directly at the camera with a friendly expression. The background maintains the pink and purple gradient lighting. A potted plant is visible on the left, and a framed dark square object hangs on the right wall. The framing is a medium close-up, centered on her. The scene feels inviting and conclusive.

scenes.visual_description: The woman sits with the microphone in her lap, smiling at the camera in a medium close-up. The background features the same pink and purple lighting. White text overlays appear on the screen, showing her final call to action. The text spells out the app name letter by letter as she says it. The scene concludes with a friendly and direct appeal to the viewer.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Did you get it ? [Did you get it?]
Character A says: Télécharge Speak. [Download Speak.]
Character A says: S-P-E-A-K. [S-P-E-A-K.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Did you get it ? Télécharge Speak. S-P-E-A-K.
